        Time.deriv x 0 = ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.v₀ IC →
    x = ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.trajectory S IC

sol := IC.trajectory S
  have h_sol_eom : S.EquationOfMotion sol := trajectory_equationOfMotion S IC
  have h_sol_x₀ : sol 0 = IC.x₀ := trajectory_position_at_zero S IC
  have h_sol_v₀ : ∂ₜ sol 0 = IC.v₀ := trajectory_velocity_at_zero S IC
  exact HarmonicOscillator.EquationOfMotion.uniqueness S x sol h.1 h_sol_eom h.2.1 h_sol_x₀ h.2.2 h_sol_v₀

    rw [h_eq, ω_sq]
    field_simp [S.ω_neq_zero]
    ring_nf
    module
  have hf0 : f t = f 0 := by
    let F := f ∘ (fun (r : ℝ) => (⟨r⟩ : Time))
    have hF : deriv F = 0 := by
      ext r
      have := congr_fun hf ⟨r⟩
      simp [F, Time.deriv] at *
      exact this
    have hF_const : F t.val = F 0 := is_const_of_deriv_eq_zero hF t.val 0
    exact hF_const
  simp [f, h_x₀, h_v₀, trajectory] at hf0
  exact hf0.symm

    have h_deriv_cos : ∂ₜ (fun t' : Time => cos (S.ω * (t - t'))) t' = S.ω * sin (S.ω * (t - t')) := by
      simp [Time.deriv]; rw [fderiv_cos (by fun_prop)]; simp; ring
    have h_deriv_sin : ∂ₜ (fun t' : Time => sin (S.ω * (t - t')) / S.ω) t' = - cos (S.ω * (t - t')) := by
      simp [Time.deriv]; rw [fderiv_sin (by fun_prop)]; simp [S.ω_neq_zero]; ring
    rw [fderiv_fun_add (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
    simp [fderiv_smul_const (by fun_prop), fderiv_smul_const (by fun_prop), h_deriv_cos, h_deriv_sin]
    module
  have h_const : f t = f 0 := by
    apply is_const_of_deriv_eq_zero
    · intro t'; rw [Time.deriv] at hf; exact hf t'
  simpa [f, trajectory_eq, h.2.1, h.2.2] using h_const.symm

end HarmonicOscillator

set y := fun t => (x t - IC.trajectory S t) i
  let e t := (S.ω * y t) ^ 2 + (∂ₜ y t) ^ 2
  have h_e : e t = 0 := by
    rw [← is_const_of_deriv_eq_zero (by fun_prop) (f := e) ?_ t 0, ?_]
    · ext t'; simp [e, Time.deriv]
      have h1 := h.1; have h2 := trajectory_equationOfMotion S IC
      rw [EquationOfMotion, gradLagrangian_eq_force, force_eq_linear] at h1 h2
      have := congr_fun (congr_fun h1 t' - congr_fun h2 t') i
      simp only [Pi.zero_apply, Pi.sub_apply, PiLp.sub_apply, PiLp.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul] at this
      field_simp [S.m_pos.ne'] at this; simp [y, this]; ring
    · simp [e, y, h.2.1, h.2.2, trajectory_position_at_zero, trajectory_velocity_at_zero]
  simpa [S.ω_neq_zero] using (sq_add_sq_eq_zero.1 h_e).1
